title: 教訓之一：決してパーティーを怠るな

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Congratulations! Cheers! Kampai!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
First off, I wanna thank every one of y'all for
comin'! And I wanna dedicate this honor to my
mom, my dad, my friends... and of course...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
The amazing director who offered me the star
role in his Western!

text_block_list.name: Young Man
text_block_list.text:
What?! Y-you're not talking about me, are you?!
I'm still just a student! I'm not an amazing director
or anything...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Passerby
text_block_list.text:
Hold on, what's going on?! Does that mean Taiki
was in a movie and won some kind of award?!
Holy cow!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Hey, you back there! Y'all are welcome to come
join the party! We've got all sorts of fun stuff
planned! ♪

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Sure it is! First rule of partyin' is the more the
merrier! Okay, y'all, first up is...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: A barbecue dance!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Let's do a dance to make the meat taste extra
good! Rare! ♪ Medium! ♪ Well-done! ♪ And a
do-si-do! ♪

text_block_list.name: Director
text_block_list.text: Uh, um... do-si-do!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
All right! The next number is... B-18! Any of y'all
got bingo yet?!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Congratulations! Allow me to present you
with your fabulous prize...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: An autograph from me and the director!

text_block_list.name: Director
text_block_list.text:
My autograph?! A-are you sure that counts as a
prize?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
All right, y'all, this thing's been more fun than a
barrel of monkeys! Let's finish things off with a
bang!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Wow! Fantastic! Now that's what I call beautiful!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Thank y'all so much for coming today! I had a
blast!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I feel like I'm really gonna nail this part when we
start filming!
choice_data_list: Nice! Good luck with fil—wait, what?
Nice! Good luck with fil—wait, what?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: What?
choice_data_list:
I thought you were celebrating winning an
award?

I thought you were celebrating winning an
award?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
An award? Let's not get ahead of ourselves!
We've gotta film the movie first!

text_block_list.name: Director
text_block_list.text: And before that... I need to assemble a crew!

text_block_list.name: Director
text_block_list.text:
You see, I'm trying to put together a film for a
student film festival. I couldn't figure out who I
should ask to play the lead, but then...

text_block_list.name: Director
text_block_list.text:
That's when I saw Taiki running in a big race. I was
floored by her enthusiasm. Even under so much
pressure, she looked so cheerful.

text_block_list.name: Director
text_block_list.text:
At that moment, I knew she'd be perfect as my
lead, so I offered her the part right away!

text_block_list.name: Director
text_block_list.text:
And she agreed! Before I knew it, she was already
talking about getting things moving. I thought
she meant preparing for filming, but...
choice_data_list: But she meant organizing a party?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Well, I was just so happy! And what's better than
a party when you're happy?!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Of course, I've got the other stuff in mind too.
We still need a crew, right?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
So we're gonna need scouting parties! We'll have
one for auditions and another for scouting
locations!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I guess this is Taiki Shuttle's way of expressing her
excitement at appearing in the movie...
